case_title: MORRIS, VERONICA C. C/O CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE VS HOGAN, CLAY : OWNER OF:SAN FRANCISCO PLUMBING CO.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOGAN, CLAY : OWNER OF:SAN FRANCISCO PLUMBING CO.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY MORRIS, VERONICA C. C/O CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE AS TO DEFENDANT HOGAN, CLAY : OWNER OF:SAN FRANCISCO PLUMBING CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
